productDisplayName: Peter England Men Solid Black Trouser
description: Composition Black trouser made of a cotton blend fabric, has a flat front, pockets on the sides, two pockets at the back with button closures, looped waist, and a zipper and button closure on the front Fitting Slim Wash care Machine wash warm in a gentle cycle, using a mild detergent Use only non-chlorine bleach if needed Tumble dry low Warm iron Crafted from rich ceremonial fabric to blend perfectly the best of Indian tradition and Western silhouettes, this trouser from the Weddings collection of peter england is all set to help you make that grand entry in style. Team it with a classic shirt from the Weddings collection, add on ethno-wester footwear and classy accessories. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and waist 32"
